concerns.concern: IP litigation and trade secret theft
concerns.do_implication: Patent infringement suits create D&O exposure when management failed to protect IP portfolio or knowingly used third-party IP without license
CCPA/GDPR violations trigger Section 10b-5 SCA when data breach impacts stock price and management delayed disclosure
DOJ/FTC antitrust actions create Section 10b-5 exposure if monopoly maintenance or anticompetitive conduct was concealed from investors

concerns.concern: Revenue recognition and SaaS metrics manipulation
concerns.do_implication: Channel stuffing, premature recognition, or inflated ARR/MRR metrics trigger accounting fraud SCA under Section 10b-5
Emerging AI tort liability and EU AI Act non-compliance create novel derivative suit exposure for failure of board oversight

concerns.concern: FDA approval and clinical trial disclosure
concerns.do_implication: Failure to disclose adverse clinical trial results or FDA rejection risk triggers Section 10b-5 SCA when stock drops on negative FDA decision
State AG and federal drug pricing investigations create derivative suit exposure for board failure to oversee pricing practices

concerns.concern: False Claims Act and Medicare/Medicaid fraud
concerns.do_implication: Qui tam FCA suits and DOJ interventions trigger SCA when government fraud investigation causes stock decline
Failure to disclose imminent loss of exclusivity or ANDA paragraph IV challenges creates revenue miss SCA theory

concerns.concern: Consumer lending and fair lending violations
concerns.do_implication: CFPB consent orders and fair lending violations create derivative suit exposure under Caremark duty of oversight
FinCEN enforcement actions for BSA/AML failures trigger SCA when remediation costs and regulatory penalties impact earnings
MDL interchange fee litigation and merchant class actions create ongoing D&O exposure for failure to disclose litigation reserves

concerns.concern: Interest rate risk and loan loss reserve adequacy
concerns.do_implication: Understated loan loss reserves trigger accounting fraud SCA when credit losses materially exceed disclosed estimates

concerns.concern: Product liability and mass tort exposure
concerns.do_implication: Product defect mass torts (asbestos, PFAS, talc) create SCA when management concealed known defects or understated reserves
EPA CERCLA actions and state environmental enforcement trigger SCA when cleanup costs materially exceed disclosed environmental reserves
Repeated OSHA citations and willful violations create Caremark derivative exposure for board failure to oversee safety compliance

concerns.concern: Supply chain concentration and sole-source risk
concerns.do_implication: Undisclosed supply chain concentration creates Section 10b-5 exposure when disruption causes revenue miss

concerns.concern: Same-store sales and comp metrics manipulation
concerns.do_implication: Inflated same-store sales or misleading comp metrics trigger Section 10b-5 SCA when actual performance falls short

concerns.concern: Product safety recalls and CPSC actions
concerns.do_implication: Delayed recall disclosure creates derivative suit exposure for board failure to oversee product safety processes
Wage & hour class actions and EEOC pattern-or-practice suits create D&O exposure when settlement costs impact earnings guidance
Overstated proved reserves or delayed impairment recognition triggers accounting fraud SCA under Section 10b-5
State AG climate fraud suits and SEC climate disclosure enforcement create novel SCA theories for climate risk misrepresentation
PHMSA enforcement and operational disasters create derivative suit exposure under Caremark for safety oversight failures
DOJ/SEC FCPA enforcement for foreign government payments triggers SCA when investigation disclosure impacts stock price

concerns.concern: REIT distribution sustainability and FFO manipulation
concerns.do_implication: Misleading FFO/AFFO metrics or unsustainable distribution coverage triggers SCA when distribution cut causes stock decline

concerns.concern: Related party transactions and conflicts of interest
concerns.do_implication: External management conflicts and related party leasing create derivative suit exposure for breach of duty of loyalty
Undisclosed property contamination creates Section 10b-5 exposure when remediation costs materially exceed reserves

concerns.concern: Rate case outcomes and regulatory lag
concerns.do_implication: Failure to disclose adverse rate case risk triggers SCA when PUC denial causes earnings miss and stock decline
Inverse condemnation and wildfire liability (PG&E precedent) create catastrophic D&O exposure when infrastructure failure causes mass casualties
Understated decommissioning reserves create SCA exposure when NRC enforcement or cost escalation impacts earnings

concerns.concern: Subscriber metrics and churn rate manipulation
concerns.do_implication: Inflated subscriber counts or concealed churn rates trigger Section 10b-5 SCA when actual metrics fall below guidance

concerns.concern: Content licensing and programming cost escalation
concerns.do_implication: Undisclosed programming cost inflation or key content license loss creates earnings miss SCA theory

concerns.concern: FCC regulatory enforcement and spectrum compliance
concerns.do_implication: FCC enforcement actions and spectrum auction obligations create D&O exposure when regulatory penalties impact guidance
